use_cases: Enable users to upload files and get AI-powered assistance or document analysis
Provide a conversational interface for document-related queries in content platforms
Offer file upload and chat support for customer service or helpdesk applications
Create collaborative document review workflows with AI feedback
Build knowledge base assistants that accept file uploads for context
ai_summary: A versatile file upload and chat interface component that combines drag-and-drop file handling with conversational AI messaging. Features dark/light mode toggle, file type detection with icons, auto-scrolling messages, and a typing indicator. The component supports multiple file types (images, videos, audio, archives, documents) and presents a clean flat UI design suitable for SaaS platforms, developer tools, and content creation applications.
